title: eriophyllum lanatum var. lanatum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. lanatum, also known as woolly sunflower or Bear's Club, is a perennial shrubby plant native to the dry areas of western North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Eriophyllum lanatum var. lanatum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
